description_long: This shotgun features a robust, dark metal construction with a long, cylindrical barrel and a tubular magazine running parallel beneath it. The fore-end and pistol grip are crafted from a reddish-brown wood, providing a classic and ergonomic appearance. The receiver is metallic, with a visible loading port and a prominent trigger guard. The muzzle end is open, showing the twin tubes of the barrel and magazine, while the rear features a compact, contoured wooden grip. The shotgun lacks a full stock, instead opting for a pistol grip design, making it more compact and maneuverable. The overall finish is matte, with subtle metallic highlights and a utilitarian, rugged aesthetic.
description: A compact, pump-action shotgun with a dark metal barrel, tubular magazine, and reddish-brown wooden pistol grip. The design is robust and utilitarian, with a matte finish and no full stock.
description_view_0: Front and top view showing the open muzzle, twin tubes, and the wooden pistol grip; the pump handle and trigger guard are partially visible.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the full length of the barrel, tubular magazine, and the wooden grip; the pump handle and receiver details are clearly visible.
description_view_2: Rear and angled view displaying the contoured wooden grip, the back of the receiver, and the underside of the barrel and magazine.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile showing the metallic receiver, trigger guard, and the wooden grip; the pump handle and loading port are visible.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with a tubular magazine beneath; no ribbing or venting visible; barrel and magazine are of similar length.
attribute_trigger_guard_design: Rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves or reinforcement.
